items.title: Cardinal Burke returns to Latin Mass as Pope Leo lifts restrictions imposed by Pope Francis
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A top American cardinal celebrated a traditional Latin Mass on Saturday in St. Peter's Basilica with the explicit permission of Pope Leo XIV, thrilling traditionalist Catholics who had felt abandoned after Pope Francis greatly restricted the ancient liturgy. (AP Video and production by Veronica Andrea Sauchelli

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump says there's a really good chance of making 'very comprehensive' deal with China
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump is heading for Asia for the first time this term, a trip where he is expected to work on investment deals and peace efforts before meeting face-to-face with Chinese President Xi Jinping to try to de-escalate a trade war.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Venezuela's Maduro says the US is 'fabricating' a war as aircraft carrier travels to region
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Venezuelan President Nicolás Maduro said the United States government is 'fabricating' a war against his country as the world's biggest warship approaches the South American country.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Trump meets with Emir of Qatar and PM during stop on his way to ASEAN
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>President Donald Trump met with the Emir of Qatar Sheikh Tamim bin Hamad al-Thani and the Prime Minister Sheikh Mohammed bin Abdulrahman bin Jassim Al Thani aboard Air Force One during a refueling stop on his way to Malaysia Saturday for the ASEAN summit. 


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: LIVE: Trump arrives in Malaysia to begin his Asia visit
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Watch live as U.S. President Donald Trump arrives in Kuala Lumpur to attend the ASEAN summit during his first trip to Asia since returning to the White House. After Malaysia, Trump will head to Japan and South Korea.

#trump #malaysia #live</article>

items.title: Arrival of new Irish President Catherine Connolly at Dublin Castle
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Left-wing independent Catherine Connolly arrived at Dublin Castle Saturday evening to greet supporters after her rival conceded defeat in a presidential election.

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Russian missile and drone attacks on Ukraine kill 4 and wound 20
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>A fire broke out in a non-residential building in one location, while debris from intercepted missiles fell in an open area at another site, damaging windows in nearby buildings, Ukraine’s State Emergency Service wrote on the message app Telegram. 


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Miguel’s new ‘CAOS’ album explores his divorce, album hiatus and Mexican identity
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>R&B superstar Miguel emerged from his nearly decadelong studio album hiatus with ‘CAOS.’ Inspired and grieved by current global events, the Grammy winner, whose mother is Black and father is Mexican, explores his Latino roots and his public divorce in his new project. (Oct. 25) (AP interview and production by Gary Gerard Hamilton)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Tourists flock to Louvre window used in jewel heist
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Since last Sunday’s daring daylight heist, visitors have gathered outside the museum to photograph the now-famous balcony window that robbers used to break into the Apollo Gallery. 

(AP Video by Nicolas Garriga)

Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: US Secretary of State Marco Rubio leaves Tel Aviv
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Rubio was the latest in a series of top US officials to visit the center for civilian and military coordination. US Vice President JD Vance was there earlier this week where he announced its opening, and US envoys Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner, the president's son-in-law, were also in Israel.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Sudan Archives finds freedom in new album 'The BPM' | AP interview
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Sudan Archives wants fans to get up a dance with her third studio album “The BPM.” The violinist, singer and songwriter born Brittney Denise Parks sat down with AP entertainment journalist Leslie Ambriz to talk about expanding her artistry, collaborating with family and her spiritual connection to J Dilla. #sudanarchives</article>

items.title: LIVE: Russell Crowe and Rami Malek attend ‘Nuremberg’ premiere at AFI Fest
items.author: Associated Press
items.content: <article>Watch live as Russell Crowe, Rami Malek and Michael Shannon attend the AFI Fest premiere of "Nuremberg” in Los Angeles.</article>

items.title: President Ouattara votes in Ivory Coast presidential election
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>Ouattara is seeking a fourth term in office. At 83, Ouattara’s decision has drawn widespread criticism, especially after two major opposition candidates were barred from running. The move sparked protests earlier this month, which were met with a heavy crackdown.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Five minutes driving across Gaza City - AP shows destruction after 2 two years of war
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>The U.N. development agency said the amount of rubble in Gaza would be enough to build 13 giant pyramids in Egypt or fill up all of New York’s Central Park about 40 feet high with debris. The latest joint estimate from the U.N., the European Union and the World Bank is that $70 billion will be required to rebuild the Strip.


Subscribe: http://smarturl.it/AssociatedPress
Read more: https://apnews.com​

This video may be available for archive licensing via https://newsroom.ap.org/home</article>

items.title: Taiwan LGBTQ+ Pride participants express disagreement on US President's gender binarism
items.author: Associated Press
items.content:
<article>An estimated total of 130,000 people took part in Taiwan's 23rd LGBTQ+ parade under the autumn rain.  

(AP Video by Taijing Wu)
